note: apps/<name>/**/*.stories.(tsx|ts|mdx) title 必以 Apps/<app-name>/ 開頭。apps/template 3 檔全合規:App.stories.tsx='Apps/template/AppShell Dashboard'、AllDsComponents.stories.tsx='Apps/template/All DS Components (Portal)'、CompositionFidelityReplica.stories.tsx='Apps/template/Composition Fidelity Replica'。無錯 prefix residue。
